auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Quentn API key sent with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create or copy an API key from Settings > API Info in your Quentn system: https://help.quentn.com/hc/en-150/articles/4517564565649-Requests

extraFields.label: System ID
extraFields.description: Quentn system ID from your API endpoint hostname, for example the first label in https://my-system.server.quentn.com/public/api/V1.

extraFields.label: Server ID
extraFields.description: Quentn server ID from your API endpoint hostname, for example the second label in https://my-system.server.quentn.com/public/api/V1.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create one Quentn contact with optional duplicate handling.

request_ip.description: IPv4 address associated with this contact submission.

ba_street.description: Billing address street, required when mail is omitted.

ba_city.description: Billing address city, required when mail is omitted.

ba_postal_code.description: Billing address postal code, required when mail is omitted.

contact.description: Quentn contact fields, including custom fields.

duplicate_check_method.description: Method Quentn uses to search for duplicate contacts.

duplicate_merge_method.description: Method Quentn uses to merge a contact when a duplicate is found.

return_fields.description: Additional contact fields Quentn should return.

flood_limit.description: Maximum contacts allowed from the same request_ip within an hour; 0 disables the check.

spam_protection.description: Whether Quentn should check request_ip for spam protection.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for creating a Quentn contact.
Input fields for creating a Quentn term.

actions.name: delete_contact
actions.description: Delete one Quentn contact by contact ID.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for selecting a Quentn contact.

success.description: Whether Quentn reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: delete_term
actions.description: Delete one Quentn term by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for selecting a Quentn term.

success.description: Whether Quentn reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: find_contacts_by_email
actions.description: Find Quentn contacts by email address.

fields.description: Optional contact field names to return.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for finding Quentn contacts by email.

actions.name: get_contact_by_id
actions.description: Get one Quentn contact by contact ID.

fields.description: Optional contact field names to return.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for fetching a Quentn contact with optional returned fields.

actions.name: get_term
actions.description: Get one Quentn term by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for selecting a Quentn term.

anyOf.description: Whether Quentn blocks deletion for this term.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get one Quentn user by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for fetching a Quentn user.

anyOf.description: UNIX timestamp when the user was created.
UNIX timestamp when the user was changed.

actions.name: list_contact_terms
actions.description: List all Quentn terms assigned to one contact.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for listing terms assigned to a contact.

anyOf.description: Whether Quentn blocks deletion for this term.

limit.description: Maximum number of terms to return.

inputSchema.description: Pagination options for listing Quentn terms.

anyOf.description: Whether Quentn blocks deletion for this term.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Quentn users visible to the current API key.

limit.description: Maximum number of users to return, between 1 and 20.

sort.description: The order of Quentn list results.

inputSchema.description: Pagination options for listing Quentn users.

anyOf.description: UNIX timestamp when the user was created.
UNIX timestamp when the user was changed.

actions.name: remove_contact_terms
actions.description: Remove selected Quentn terms from one contact.

term_ids.description: Quentn term IDs to remove from the contact.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for removing contact terms.

success.description: Whether Quentn reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: set_contact_terms
actions.description: Set the complete Quentn term ID list assigned to one contact.

term_ids.description: Quentn term IDs to assign to the contact.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for setting contact terms.

success.description: Whether Quentn reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update one Quentn contact by contact ID.

request_ip.description: IPv4 address associated with this contact submission.

ba_street.description: Billing address street, required when mail is omitted.

ba_city.description: Billing address city, required when mail is omitted.

ba_postal_code.description: Billing address postal code, required when mail is omitted.

updates.description: Quentn contact fields, including custom fields.

return_fields.description: Additional contact fields Quentn should return.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for updating a Quentn contact.

success.description: Whether Quentn reported a successful update.

actions.name: update_term
actions.description: Update one Quentn term by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for updating a Quentn term.

success.description: Whether Quentn reported the operation as successful.
